_note: Jesus's kin, handled with Catholic care. Mary's parents (Heli=Joachim, & Anne) are in 07g. ELIZABETH is now Mary's COUSIN: their mothers Anne & Sobe are sisters (daughters of Emerentia) per medieval tradition; Luke 1:36 only says 'kinswoman'. Elizabeth is 'of the daughters of Aaron' (Luke 1:5) through her father, a priest. She carries her OWN 1st-century-BC dates so she renders beside Mary (not estimated from an ancient ancestor). The old Levi->AARONHOUSE bridge is REMOVED (it was date-poisoning John the Baptist to ~1750 BC, stranding him next to the Ptolemies). The 'brethren of the Lord' (Mk 6:3) stay COUSINS via Clopas & Mary of Clopas, not children of the Virgin Mary. Sorts after 07g so Anne exists.
